bundles.title: Run Readers and Resolution
bundles.goal: Resolve the tracked run and load all read-only watcher inputs from disk with tolerant parsing.
outputs: unit tests for run resolution and tolerant artifact parsing

tasks.title: Implement run scanning and resolution order with run_id, change_name active-run lookup, and current-branch fallback
Add read-only loaders for run-state, optional autofix snapshots, and validated task-graph input with graceful degraded states
Add a JSONL tailer that returns the last N events for the tracked run and ignores torn final lines
Cover resolution and reader edge cases with unit tests for missing, malformed, and partially written artifacts

bundles.title: Filesystem Watch Runtime
bundles.goal: Provide a disposable watch runtime that coalesces file events and polling fallback into a single redraw signal.
inputs: watched artifact path contract for run.json, autofix-progress files, events.jsonl, and task-graph.json
outputs: unit tests for parent-directory watches, polling fallback, and debounce behavior

tasks.title: Implement watchPaths for explicit file paths, including parent-directory watches when a watched file does not yet exist
Combine fs.watch notifications with an 80 ms redraw debounce and a 2 second mtime and size polling fallback
Expose normalized change callbacks and cleanup semantics that remove watchers and timers cleanly
Add temp-directory tests covering create, update, delete, and atomic-replace scenarios across the watched paths

bundles.title: ANSI Watch Renderer
bundles.goal: Render the watcher model as a full-screen ANSI TUI with stable sections, bundle progress bars, and degraded-state placeholders.
outputs: golden-frame tests for startup, inactive runs, and narrow terminals

tasks.title: Define the render model for header, review status, bundle progress, and recent events
Implement 16-color ANSI frame rendering with alt-screen sections, per-section diffing, and resize-safe layout
Render topological bundle bars, placeholder states, parse-error banners, and frozen-run messaging
Add golden tests for startup, degraded artifacts, inactive runs, and width-clamped progress bars

bundles.title: Watch CLI Adapter
bundles.goal: Ship the specflow-watch binary that wires readers, watcher runtime, and renderer into a clean terminal lifecycle.
outputs: CLI usage contract for specflow-watch arguments and exit behavior

tasks.title: Implement CLI argument parsing, git branch detection, and initial tracked-run resolution
Wire initial reads, redraw pipeline, resize handling, and watch loop updates into the process adapter
Implement read-only terminal lifecycle behavior including alt-screen enter and exit, q and Ctrl+C shutdown, and frozen-run banner handling
Register the binary in package.json and lock the invocation contract consumed by slash-command guides

bundles.title: Slash Command Guide
bundles.goal: Expose the watcher through the existing command contract pipeline and generate the /specflow.watch guide.
inputs: CLI usage contract for specflow-watch arguments and exit behavior

tasks.title: Add the specflow.watch command contract entry with no phase handoff and no run hook
Register the command body so the template-resolver pipeline emits the new guide
Author the guide template with tmux-first launch, macOS open fallback, and explicit manual launch instructions
Generate and verify the rendered global command artifact for specflow.watch

bundles.title: Acceptance and Guardrails
bundles.goal: Prove the watcher meets the read-only and real-time acceptance criteria and does not regress existing contracts.
outputs: import-graph regression test for specflow-watch read-only dependencies
seeded-run integration tests for redraws, placeholders, and clean exit
passing npm run check for the specflow-watch change

tasks.title: Add an import-graph or module-boundary test that blocks writer and mutation paths from the watcher binary
Add seeded-run integration coverage for startup render, file-change redraws, inactive-run banner, resize, and clean exit
Validate command guide generation and end-to-end CLI behavior under missing or malformed optional artifacts
Run npm run check and resolve any typecheck, lint, format, test, or contract validation failures
